payload.title: Standard Follow-Up Report: Transit Adjudication Bureau, 3rd Quarter 2023
payload.description: Standard Follow-Up Report updating the Transit Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau (TAB) activities and outcomes for the 3rd Quarter 2023

tool_args.label: Transit Adjudication Bureau (TAB)
tool_args.raw_text: TAB is the statutory administrative tribunal that receives, processes, adjudicates and pursues collection of civil penalties arising from the tens of thousands of civil summonses that are issued each year for violations of the Transit Rules of Conduct.

payload.description: Statutory administrative tribunal that receives, processes, adjudicates and pursues collection of civil penalties arising from violations of the Transit Rules of Conduct

evidence_refs.source_quote: update the Transit Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau (TAB) activities and outcomes
TAB is the statutory administrative tribunal that receives, processes, adjudicates and pursues collection of civil penalties

payload.title: Vice President and General Counsel, NYC Transit Law Department General Counsel, MTA Bus Company

Payments received increased 19% Q3 2023 vs Q3 2022
tool_args.raw_text: TAB received 27,370 payments in Q3 2023, a 19% increase from the 23,064 received in Q3 2022

payload.subject: TAB payments received

tool_args.label: Direct payments increased 21% Q3 2023 vs Q3 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Direct payments increased by 21% (from 21,446 to 25,888) compared to the third quarter of 2022

tool_args.label: State tax payments decreased 8% Q3 2023 vs Q3 2022

tool_args.label: Total amount paid increased 24% Q3 2023 vs Q3 2022
